title: gumnazo #1128
definition:
1) to exercise naked (in a palaestra or school of athletics)
 2) to exercise vigorously, in any way, either the body or the mind
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to exercise naked (in a palaestra or school of athletics)
 2) to exercise vigorously, in any way, either the body or the mind

    NASB:  to exercise naked, to train:
